profile.description: IT professional with 20+ years of experience spanning systems administration, network security, and full-stack software development. Proven ability to design and deliver end-to-end technical solutions — from securing and rebuilding critical infrastructure to developing AI-powered applications. Managed systems for 1,000+ terminal environments in highly regulated sectors (healthcare, automotive, retail). Fluent in English (bilingual), experienced working in international teams across Spain, England, and multinational environments.

education.title: Higher Technician in Web Application Development (DAW)
education.description: JavaScript, PHP, Node.js, React, REST APIs, database design, web deployment, accessibility, ORM, Git, Odoo ERP

education.title: Higher Technician in Multiplatform App Development (DAM)
education.description: Java, Kotlin, Flutter, Android development, ORM (Hibernate), services & processes, 2D/3D game engines, UML, TDD

education.title: React Bootcamp
education.description: React.js components, hooks, state, context, Redux, REST API integration, component testing

experience.title: Software Developer (AI Project) — Internship
experience.description: Built 'Minichef' from scratch: an AI voice assistant for professional kitchen management. Engineered a complete Python pipeline integrating real-time speech-to-text (Vosk), NLP, database operations, and text-to-speech synthesis (gTTS/Pygame) — enabling hands-free, conversational access to inventory, recipes, and supplier data.

experience.title: IT Support Technician — Healthcare Network
experience.description: Maintained 99%+ uptime for network infrastructure serving hospitals and health centres across 3 provinces. Managed Cisco and Fortigate routers, firewalls and VPNs. Handled incident management via Jira, Confluence, and custom ticketing apps.

experience.title: Support Specialist — Ford European Operations
experience.description: Remote IT support for Ford manufacturing plants across 4 countries (Spain, Germany, UK, Hungary). Streamlined Active Directory user lifecycle management. Administered virtualised servers hosted in India for automated task scheduling. Performed critical remote interventions on India-hosted servers to execute database cleanup scripts when errors occurred — a mission-critical process, as failure to clear stale data would block information flow to European plants and risk halting production lines.

experience.title: N2 Support Technician & Junior Developer
experience.description: Deployed Zabbix monitoring across Linux and Windows infrastructure. Set up VMware ESXi virtualisation and AWS cloud infrastructure. Contributed as Junior Developer in Python and Java. Oracle SQL database support. Agile/Scrum with University of Valencia's ITI.

experience.title: Systems Administrator
experience.description: Increased infrastructure performance by 60% by redesigning the data centre from scratch. Introduced the company's first security layer (Cisco/Sophos firewalls). Led ERP system selection and procurement. Managed all IT operations solo: ESXi, VPN/AD, Linux, SQL.

experience.title: IT Administrator — CPD Operations
experience.description: Operated mission-critical data centres for Ford (engine plant) and Mercadona (national retail). Monitored infrastructure with HP OVO, automated workflows with Axway. Managed backups with HP Dataprotector and CommVault with zero data loss.

experience.title: IT Administrator & Technician
experience.description: Managed IT systems and networks for NHS hospitals, hotel chains, restaurant groups and automotive franchises across southern England. Deployed complete network and server infrastructures for new client sites.

experience.title: Systems Administrator — Hospital IT
experience.description: Sole IT responsible during night shifts, ensuring 24/7 continuity of critical healthcare IT infrastructure (Citrix, Exchange, virtualised systems, routers, firewalls).

portfolio.title: Minichef — AI Voice Assistant
portfolio.description: AI voice assistant for professional kitchen management with real-time speech-to-text, NLP, and text-to-speech synthesis.

portfolio.title: Interactive Portfolio
portfolio.description: Full-stack portfolio with desktop-window UI metaphor. AI chatbot, visitor analytics with maps, 8-API job aggregation (Jobicy, Remotive, Arbeitnow, JSearch, RemoteOK, Himalayas, Adzuna, WeWorkRemotely) with unified search, AI job matching (sentence-transformers + LLM re-ranking), Kanban pipeline, salary analytics, SSE real-time notifications, JWT auth with refresh tokens, 6 Three.js/Canvas backgrounds, terminal easter egg, full i18n (6 languages), and WCAG accessibility.

portfolio.title: Healthcare Network Management
portfolio.description: Infrastructure management for hospitals across 3 provinces, maintaining 99%+ uptime for critical healthcare services.
